# Ai Embedded Systems

> Robotics and embedded AI systems for physical-world intelligence.

Ai Embedded Systems builds Rnv1 robotics and embedded AI systems that turn real-world sensor signals into onboard perception, memory, reasoning, and action. The company focuses on local AI, sensor fusion, robot perception, real-time control, and robust embedded autonomy.

## Canonical URLs

- Homepage: https://aiembeddedsystems.com/
- Service pages:
  - https://aiembeddedsystems.com/rnv1-robotics/
  - https://aiembeddedsystems.com/embedded-ai-systems/
  - https://aiembeddedsystems.com/sensor-fusion/
  - https://aiembeddedsystems.com/local-ai-robotics/
  - https://aiembeddedsystems.com/robotics-control/
  - https://aiembeddedsystems.com/edge-ai-development/
  - https://aiembeddedsystems.com/ros2-robotics/
  - https://aiembeddedsystems.com/ai-robotics-consulting/
- Cloudflare Pages fallback: https://ai-embedded-systems.pages.dev/
- GitHub: https://github.com/nawnie
- Public GitHub repo: https://github.com/nawnie/ai-embedded-systems

## People

- Robert Delgado: Co-Founder, Robotics
- Shawn O'Hagan: Co-Founder, Software & AI

## Contact

- Software and AI: sohagan.dev@aiembeddedsystems.com
- Robotics: robert@aiembeddedsystems.com

## Product And Technology Focus

- Rnv1 robotics prototype platform
- Embedded AI systems
- Sensor-driven perception
- Local onboard AI
- Data and memory for robot experience
- Sensor fusion, SLAM, and detection
- Linux RT, ROS 2, DDS, and robot middleware
- Robust control for real-world action

## Roadmap Snapshot

- Q3 2026: Rnv1 prototype build, co-founder-led architecture, sensor suite validation
- Q4 2026: Perception V1, sensor fusion, local mapping and tracking
- Q1 2027: Local AI V1, onboard inference, behavior primitives, memory and logging
- Q2 2027: Field testing, autonomy evaluation, reliability hardening
- Q3 2027+: Partner pilots, fleet tools, developer enablement

## Preferred Summary

Ai Embedded Systems builds robotics and embedded AI systems that perceive, reason, remember, and act onboard in real time.
